arts.ttl: How Bournemouth's punt on 'Chill Guy' Huijsen has paid off
arts.sum: It was a transfer that went under the radar in the summer of 2024. But less than 12 months later, £12m has turned into £50m.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth out to end 94-year wait for winning feat in Premier League home clash with Fulham
arts.sum: Bournemouth will have the chance to achieve a winning feat for the first time in 94 years when they face Fulham in Monday's Premier League clash at the Vitality Stadium.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs Fulham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Bournemouth host Fulham in the Premier League on Monday night. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV and live stream, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Team News: Bournemouth vs. Fulham injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Monday's Premier League clash between Bournemouth and Fulham.
